message:
fix: add /cluster-admin to perf tests and GPUOverview mock data (#3591)

- Add cluster-admin dashboard to DASHBOARDS list in dashboard-perf.spec.ts
  so TTFI baselines are tracked and regressions are visible
- Add gpu-nodes mock data to all-cards-ttfi.spec.ts MOCK_DATA so
  GPUOverview card renders during perf tests

Fixes #3559, fixes #3560, fixes #3561

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ const DASHBOARDS = [
   { id: 'ai-agents', name: 'AI Agents', route: '/ai-agents' },
   { id: 'data-compliance', name: 'Data Compliance', route: '/data-compliance' },
   { id: 'arcade', name: 'Arcade', route: '/arcade' },
+  { id: 'cluster-admin', name: 'Cluster Admin', route: '/cluster-admin' },
 ]
 
 // Max cards to measure per dashboard (prevent very long tests)
